backend/main.mo: Main backend canister implementing user profiles, detection result storage, obstacle event tracking with pothole details, and role-based access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old ObstacleEvent records to new format by adding optional potholeDetails field with size, depth, severity, type, location, and distance information.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented pothole detection features including visual analysis, distance calculation, alerts within 50 meters, backend storage, and metrics panel display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components, hooks, libraries, and configuration files with focus on road detection, obstacle tracking, and pothole detection features.
frontend/docs/generated-code/backend/mai: Documentation stub for the main backend canister file describing data storage, user profiles, obstacle event tracking, and role-based access control.
frontend/docs/generated-code/frontend/sr: Documentation stub for the root application component covering theme provider, query client setup, and main app rendering.
Documentation stub for TypeScript interface definitions that define all backend canister types, enums, and method signatures.
Documentation stub for the footer component displaying copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
Documentation stub for the application header with branding, report dialog button, and theme toggle.
Documentation stub for the placeholder history section component indicating missing backend methods.
Documentation stub for the image upload interface with drag-and-drop, road detection processing, obstacle classification, and backend storage.
Documentation stub for the live camera monitoring component with obstacle tracking, motion classification, per-type counting, and backend storage.
Documentation stub for the PDF report dialog component with FileText icon trigger and modal interface.
Documentation stub for the auto-generated backend actor initialization hook managing Internet Computer canister connections.
Documentation stub for the auto-generated Internet Identity authentication provider hook managing login, logout, and identity state.
Documentation stub for React Query hooks managing obstacle events with mutations for storing and queries for retrieving classification data.
Documentation stub for the obstacle detection algorithm using color segmentation and position analysis to classify objects into standardized types.
Documentation stub for the frame-to-frame obstacle tracking module using IoU and centroid distance to classify motion as Static or Moving.
Documentation stub for the advanced road detection algorithm with ML-based environmental adaptation, hardware optimization, and road surface feature extraction.
Documentation stub for the auto-generated application entry point that renders the root App component.
Documentation stub for the main application page with three-tab navigation, refined typography, and motion-safe animations.
frontend/docs/generated-code/README.md: Documentation overview for the Road Detection System describing the application architecture, file structure, key technologies (React, Motoko, Internet Computer), and how to navigate the generated code documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML template that mounts the React app into a div with id 'root' and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and renders the RoadDetectionApp with a toast notification system.
frontend/src/components/DetectionResults: Displays detection results in a tabbed interface showing original image, road detection, obstacles, segmentation, drivable areas, edges, damage, wet surfaces, and potholes with confidence scores and processing time.
frontend/src/components/DriverAlertPanel: Real-time driver alert panel that monitors obstacles, potholes, emergency conditions, and speed limits, playing audio alerts and displaying visual warnings based on proximity and severity.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright notice and attribution to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with branding, theme toggle (light/dark mode), and report dialog button.
frontend/src/components/HistorySection.t: Placeholder component for detection history feature that displays a message indicating additional backend methods are required.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadSecti: Handles image file upload via drag-and-drop or file selection, processes road and obstacle detection, stores results to backend, and displays detection results.
frontend/src/components/LiveCameraSectio: Real-time camera feed component that continuously processes video frames for road detection, obstacle tracking, speed limit recognition, pothole detection, and displays live metrics with driver alerts and audio warnings.
frontend/src/components/MetricsPanel.tsx: Displays detection metrics including confidence score, processing time, FPS, pothole detection counts, environmental conditions (weather, lighting), road type, and surface features with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/components/ReportDialog.tsx: Dialog component with a disabled button for generating PDF reports, indicating backend support is required.
frontend/src/components/SpeedLimitDispla: Card component that displays detected speed limits with confidence levels, allows current speed input, and shows color-coded warnings when approaching or exceeding the speed limit.
frontend/src/components/SystemOverviewPa: Dashboard panel that fetches and displays aggregate statistics of obstacle events including total obstacles, vehicle count, pedestrian count, debris count, and moving objects count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for storing and fetching obstacle and pothole events from the backend actor, including mutations for creating events and queries for retrieving all events.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes, including color variables, typography utilities, and button styles using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/lib/obstacleDetection.ts: Implements obstacle detection in road images using color segmentation and flood-fill algorithms, identifying objects, assessing risk levels, and generating emergency conditions with visualization overlays.
frontend/src/lib/obstacleTracking.ts: Provides frame-to-frame obstacle tracking to classify motion (static vs. moving) by matching obstacles across frames using centroid displacement and bounding box analysis.
frontend/src/lib/roadDetection.ts: Advanced road detection with hardware capability detection, environmental adaptation, and pothole detection using edge detection, dark region analysis, and perspective-based distance estimation.
frontend/src/lib/roadSurfaceFeatures.ts: Extracts comprehensive road surface features including segmentation masks, drivable area, edge detection, damage detection (potholes/cracks), and wet/slippery surface analysis with visualization generation.
frontend/src/lib/speedLimitDetection.ts: Implements computer vision-based speed limit sign detection from images/video frames, including circular region detection, number extraction, and visualization generation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/RoadDetectionApp.tsx: Main page component with tabbed interface for live camera monitoring, image upload, and history views, auto-starting in live camera mode for operational use.
frontend/src/types/detection.ts: TypeScript type definitions for road detection results including environmental conditions, metrics, pothole detection, road surface features, obstacles, and emergency conditions.
frontend/src/utils/candidEnum.ts: Utility functions to safely compare and normalize Candid enum/variant values (ObjectType, MotionType) from the backend with TypeScript types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended animations, shadows, and design tokens for the UI theme system.
project_state.json: Project state file for a Road Safety Alert application with pothole detection features. Tracks five implemented features including pothole detection, distance calculation, alerts at 50 meters, backend storage, and metrics display.
